---
title: A document with front matter
author: Test Author
date: 2026-05-18
---

# Chapter 1

The YAML front matter above should not be treated as document content. It's metadata that lives outside the prose.

A well-behaved parser strips it or surfaces it separately from the section content.

# Chapter 2

Front matter is conventional in static-site generators (Jekyll, Hugo, Astro) and increasingly in Markdown-based writing tools.
